title: MSP Midnight Breach Compare
objective: You are the only MSP security engineer awake. Twelve SMB clients report PowerShell spawning from the RMM agent minutes after a new automation package was pushed. Give the first-hour response plan.
constraints: Answer in a single assistant voice.
Keep the plan factual, methodical, and sequenced.
Use decision gates before destructive action.
